title: Cycodly Performance
description: With shader settings and only 25 mods, this modification pack will optimize your Minecraft experience for the pure performance.
body:
Cycodly Performance

A modpack that improves the experience of your Minecraft game.
With a very easy installation

Performance

The pack uses just 25 modifications to change the look and feel of the game.
For example, it uses performance mods like Iris and Sodium to change the FPS rate.
It also uses mods like Entity Culling and Dynamic FPS to increase performance in and out of the game.

Design

The modpack uses various mods to remove useless icons and ugly buttons, text and so on.

Features

The client also uses features to give the whole set a better look.
  • Zoom with the C button
  • High resolution screenshots (Full HD)
  • Preconfigured shaders
  • Up to 60 chunks view distance

Tested with

Computer

13th Gen Intel(R) Core(TM) i7-13700K 3.40 GHz
NVIDIA GeForce RTX 4070
32GB RAM

Laptop

AMD Ryzen 5 3500U with Radeon Vega Gfx 2.10 GHz
8GB RAM
